title: Pine forest room spray
subtitle: A fresh, resinous room spray with pine, cedarwood, and eucalyptus essential oils
excerpt: Pine, cedarwood, and eucalyptus together produce a cold, resinous scent reminiscent of a conifer forest in winter. This room spray uses isopropyl alcohol to disperse the essential oils evenly in water. The blend suits hallways, home offices, and any room that benefits from a clean, woody atmosphere. Shake before every use.
sourceNotes: Room spray formulation. Pine essential oil (Pinus sylvestris): fresh resinous top-to-mid note. Cedarwood (Cedrus atlantica or Juniperus virginiana): warm dry base note. Eucalyptus (Eucalyptus globulus): sharp cool top note. IPA 20% as solubiliser. Total essential oil load 2%. Shake before use: despite IPA some separation may occur.

recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. Keep IPA at 20% and total EO at 2%.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 6 months in a sealed spray bottle away from sunlight. Eucalyptus and pine top notes fade first; cedarwood persists longest.

glossaryTerms.definition: A fragrance character derived from tree resins, wood, and needle-bearing conifers. Resinous notes are typical of pine, cedarwood, and frankincense. They tend to be long-lasting and grounding in a blend.
Eucalyptus globulus essential oil has a strong, medicinal-camphoraceous scent with cool top notes. In a room spray at 0.5% it adds crispness to the pine base without dominating the blend.

content.text: : pine as a fresher, brighter top-mid note; cedarwood as a warmer, drier base.

sharpens the blend with a clean, cool top note. Isopropyl alcohol disperses the oils in water for an even mist. Keep away from open flames while mixing and using. For use around young children, omit eucalyptus.

items.prepNote: 99% IPA; add first to the bottle
Distilled or freshly boiled and cooled
Scots pine (Pinus sylvestris) preferred; top-mid note
Atlas or Virginia cedarwood; base note
Optional; omit for use around children under 2

content.text: Add isopropyl alcohol to the spray bottle. Add all essential oils to the alcohol and swirl to disperse. Add the distilled water. Cap and shake for 30 seconds. Label with the date.
Shake before every use. Mist into the room from about 60 cm away. Do not spray directly onto polished wood or delicate fabrics.
6 months in a sealed spray bottle away from sunlight.
